creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
I've just send a PR regarding removal of games/fwp port (see ports/117049)
As games/fwp is the only port dependent on graphics/ogre3d12, and graphics/ogre3d12 is the only port
 dependent on graphics/cegui04, ogre3d12 and cegui04 should be removed as well.

Or, at least, CONFLICTS should be added to graphics/ogre3d + graphics/ogre3d12, graphics/cegui + gra
phics/cegui04, as those ports have overlapping plists.
